description: Simulator Engine — architecture and interfaces for future cloud simulators. Simulators run in-browser (WebAssembly) or connect to sandboxed cloud environments. No implementation yet — architecture only.

linux_terminal.label: Linux Terminal Simulator
linux_terminal.description: Simulated Linux terminal for practicing CLI commands. Pre-installed cloud CLIs (az, aws, gcloud, kubectl, terraform).

azure_portal.label: Azure Portal Simulator
azure_portal.description: Simulated Azure Portal for practicing resource creation and configuration.
azure_portal.tech: React component library mimicking Azure Portal UI

terraform.label: Terraform Simulator
terraform.description: Write Terraform configs and see what resources would be created. Plan-only mode (no real provisioning).

docker.label: Docker Simulator
docker.description: Build and run containers in browser. Dockerfile editor + build output.

kubernetes.label: Kubernetes Simulator
kubernetes.description: Deploy and manage K8s resources. Visual cluster view.
kubernetes.tech: WebAssembly k3s or simulated K8s API

networking.label: Networking Simulator
networking.description: Design VPCs, subnets, routing tables. Visual packet flow.

cidr.label: CIDR Calculator
cidr.description: Interactive CIDR block calculator. Visualize IP ranges and subnet divisions.

iam.label: IAM Policy Simulator
iam.description: Write IAM policies and test against resources. See what's allowed/denied.

monitoring.label: Monitoring Simulator
monitoring.description: Configure dashboards, alerts, and SLOs. Respond to simulated incidents.

cloud_cost.label: Cloud Cost Simulator
cloud_cost.description: Build architectures and see estimated costs. Optimize for budget constraints.

architecture_builder.label: Architecture Builder
architecture_builder.description: Drag-and-drop cloud architecture diagrams. Automatic best-practice validation.

incident_response.label: Incident Response Simulator
incident_response.description: Real-time incident scenarios. Diagnose, mitigate, and post-mortem.

events.taskComplete: Emitted when a task is completed

ai_integration.hints: AI provides contextual hints based on current state
ai_integration.review: AI reviews learner's work and provides feedback
ai_integration.adaptation: AI adjusts difficulty based on performance
